title: Connect waiting list as an internal source adapter
requirements: Expose waiting list as source_code waiting_list.
Use source_origin internal and default privacy profile pii_off.
When pii_off is active, do not detect, redact, block or audit PII.
Keep secret scanning active even when pii_off is active.
Use access_policy mode adapter_check with waiting_list domain policies.
Render service, status, target dates, CITO and comment into search text according to configured privacy profile.
Extract analytics facts for created, scheduled, confirmed, cancelled, CITO and waiting time metrics.
acceptance_checks: python manage.py test apps.waiting_list.tests apps.memory.tests apps.analytics.tests
